title: v1 invoke response (synchronous-only)
description: Response body a plugin returns synchronously to a v1 (or v2-sync-mode, see v2/invoke-request.schema.json) invoke request (docs/plugin-system/phase1-implementation.md §6.4). This is the ONLY response envelope for contract_version 1 and for any contract_version 2 action whose manifest completion_mode is sync (the default). It is deliberately minimal: status plus an optional, small, generic result. There is no terminal 'state' field and no 'result_mode' field on this envelope — those only exist on the v2 deferred-completion documents (completion-event.schema.json, operation-status.schema.json, invoke-accepted-response.schema.json).

status.description: Final, synchronous outcome of this invocation.

error_code.description: Optional, nullable machine-readable error code. Only meaningful when status is failed; the host does not require its presence even then.

message.description: Optional human-readable detail, truncated by the host to 500 characters if longer.

result.description: Optional, generic result payload. Both properties are individually optional; only the two documented generic properties (url, external_id) are permitted — no other result shape is defined for v1.
